title: Flow Action: render
description: Renders the project (or a time range of the project) to a media file. The render is asynchronous: this action returns a job ID immediately, and the actual rendering happens on a worker. Progress is reported via the FLOW_EVT_101 (JobProgress) event and via the render status tool.

output.description: The output destination. The path is interpreted relative to the project directory if not absolute.

preset.description: A render preset ID. Presets are registered by plugins or built into the runtime. Use flow.effects.list to discover available presets.

range.description: Optional time range to render. If omitted, the entire timeline is rendered.

hardware_accel.description: Override the hardware acceleration policy for this render.

priority.description: Job priority. Higher values run first.

preconditions: The project must have at least one clip (else FLOW_017).
The render range (if specified) must be within the timeline's duration (else FLOW_017).
The preset must be registered (else FLOW_018).
The output path must be writable (else FLOW_201 or FLOW_203).
effects: A new job is created and a job ID is returned in the action result.
The render runs asynchronously on a worker.
On completion, FLOW_EVT_100 (JobStarted), FLOW_EVT_101 (JobProgress), FLOW_EVT_102 (JobStageChanged), and FLOW_EVT_103 (JobCompleted) events are emitted.
On failure, FLOW_EVT_104 (JobFailed) is emitted and the action result contains the error.

errors.when: The render range is out of bounds.
The decode step failed (corrupted media, unsupported codec).
The encode step failed (codec configuration error).
A GPU device ran out of memory.
Hardware acceleration was required but no GPU is available.
An AI effect in the pipeline failed.
The render was cancelled by the user.
The render exceeded the maximum allowed time.
The output path is not writable.

examples._comment: Happy path: render the entire timeline to MP4 with a TikTok vertical preset.
Happy path: render only the first 60 seconds.
Happy path: render a frame sequence for color grading.
Edge case: require hardware acceleration, but no GPU is available. Runtime returns FLOW_104.
